ddls:
CREATE TABLE "adverse_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adverse event */,
  "event_term" TEXT /* MedDRA term describing the adverse event */,
  "likelihood_ratio" REAL /* Calculated likelihood ratio for the event */,
  "likelihood_ratio_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for the likelihood ratio to indicate significance */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the adverse event (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "onset_time" TEXT /* Time of onset of the adverse event */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time of resolution of the adverse event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_data" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (e.g., male, female) */,
  "drug_taken" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient took the drug */,
  "adverse_event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the adverse event experienced by the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Patient's medical history */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Patient's known allergies */,
  "current_medications" TEXT /* Current medications the patient is taking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_data_adverse_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("adverse_event_id") REFERENCES adverse_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug usage record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient using the drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug taken by the patient */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the drug prescribed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of drug usage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of drug usage */,
  "drug_form" TEXT /* Form of the drug (e.g., tablet, liquid) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of drug usage (e.g., once daily, twice daily) */,
  "route_of_administration" TEXT /* Route of administration (e.g., oral, intravenous) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_usage_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patient_data ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "adverse_event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the adverse event */,
  "patients_with_event" INTEGER /* Number of patients who took the drug and experienced the event */,
  "patients_without_event" INTEGER /* Number of patients who took the drug and did not experience the event */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the event */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_statistics_adverse_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("adverse_event_id") REFERENCES adverse_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_group_statistics" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control group entry */,
  "adverse_event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the adverse event */,
  "patients_with_event" INTEGER /* Number of patients not taking the drug and who experienced the event */,
  "patients_without_event" INTEGER /* Number of patients not taking the drug and did not experience the event */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the event */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_group_statistics_adverse_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("adverse_event_id") REFERENCES adverse_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Medical record number of the patient */,
  "health_insurance" TEXT /* Health insurance information of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the drug */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Approval date by the regulatory body */,
  "drug_classification" TEXT /* Classification of the drug */,
  "active_ingredients" TEXT /* Active ingredients of the drug */,
  "clinical_trial_phase" TEXT /* Clinical trial phase of the drug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the adverse event being reported */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings in the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, under review) */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the report findings */,
  "follow_up_actions" TEXT /* Follow-up actions to be taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_reports_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES adverse_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of accessing the report */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES monitoring_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
